results.rendered_html: uṣar—budh (nom. -bhut) mfn. awaking with the morning light, early awaked (a N. esp. applied to Agni as kindled in the early morning),  RV.

results.rendered_html: uṣarbudh (uṣas + budh) adj. (nom. uṣarbhud) mit dem Morgenlicht erwachend, früh wach: ākīṃ sūryasya rocanādviśvāndevā~ uṣarbudhaḥ . vipro hoteha vakṣati  ṚV. 1,14,9 . 65,9  (5). 127,10 . 4,6,8 . haṃsasaḥ 4,45,4 . uṣarbhudbhūdatithirjātavedāḥ 6,4,2 . 15,1 . hinvāno vācamiṣirāmuṣarbudham 9,84,4 . 7,76,6 .
